title: BAI Prez Himanta Biswa Sarma on Monkeys at India Open
indian_angle: The President of the Badminton Association of India made a notable comment regarding spectator issues at an Indian event.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma addressed concerns about monkeys at the India Open, stating there's no issue if they come to watch.

title: BAI Issues Circular for Form-1 for Badminton Sportspersons
indian_angle: This administrative circular is crucial for Indian badminton players to obtain necessary documentation for participation.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released a circular detailing the procedure for issuing Form-1 to badminton sportspersons.

title: Indian Shuttlers Must Learn to Win Without a Coach
indian_angle: This piece offers critical advice for Indian players on developing self-reliance in matches, a key aspect of their professional growth.
summary: An opinion piece suggests Indian badminton players need to develop independent thinking and win matches without constant coaching presence.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This significant rule change will impact all domestic badminton tournaments and national championships in India.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and National Championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, starting at Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of a Super 300 event, showcasing his continued competitive form on the international circuit.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's strong run at the US Open concluded with a loss in the final, where he finished as the runner-up.
